languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in his hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be. Because I can hear him." {n}His lips quiver, and his fingers clench and unclench. He looks pitiful, lost. Bringing one hand to his temple, he squeezes his eyes shut, straining desperately to remember something. Suddenly, his eyes fly open and you hear a strangled moan. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Эоганн растерянно смотрит на сервочереп у себя в руках, потом за плечо{/n}. "Но... Как же... Нет. Не может быть. Ведь я слышу его". {n}Его губы дрожат, пальцы то сжимаются, то разжимаются. Он выглядит жалко, потерянно. Приложив пальцы к вискам он зажмуривается, мучительно пытаясь что-то вспомнить. Вдруг глаза распахиваются и раздается сдавленный стон. Он ошарашенно смотрит на вас.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn mira confuso el servocráneo que tiene en las manos, y luego mira por encima de su hombro.{/n} «Pero... ¿Cómo...? No. No puede ser. Puedo oírlo». {n}Sus labios tiemblan y abre y cierra los dedos. Tiene un aspecto patético y perdido. Se una mano a la sien, aprieta con fuerza los párpados y se esfuerza por recordar algo. De pronto, abre los ojos de par en par y suelta un gemido ahogado. Te mira patidifuso.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡困惑地看了看手中的伺服头骨，又看了看自己的肩膀。{/n}“可是……怎么……不。不可能。我明明还能听到他说话。”{n}他的嘴唇颤抖，手指握紧又松开，看起来既可怜又迷茫。他一只手按住太阳穴，紧闭双眼，拼命想回忆起什么。突然，他猛地睁开眼，发出一声压抑的呻吟。他茫然地看向你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in his hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be. Because I can hear him." {n}His lips quiver, and his fingers clench and unclench. He looks pitiful, lost. Bringing one hand to his temple, he squeezes his eyes shut, straining desperately to remember something. Suddenly, his eyes fly open and you hear a strangled moan. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡困惑地看了看手中的伺服头骨，又看了看自己的肩膀。{/n}“可是……怎么……不。不可能。我明明还能听到他说话。”{n}他的嘴唇颤抖，手指握紧又松开，看起来既可怜又迷茫。他一只手按住太阳穴，紧闭双眼，拼命想回忆起什么。突然，他猛地睁开眼，发出一声压抑的呻吟。他茫然地看向你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, qui semble soudain en proie à la plus grande confusion, regarde le servocrâne entre ses mains, puis par-dessus son épaule.{/n} « Mais... Comment... Non, c'est impossible, parce que je l'entends. » {n}Les lèvres tremblantes, il serre et desserre les poings. Il a l'air pitoyable, perdu. Portant une main à sa tempe, il ferme les yeux, comme s'il cherchait désespérément à se rappeler quelque chose. Un instant plus tard, il les rouvre brusquement, laisse échapper un gémissement étouffé et vous lance un regard abasourdi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in his hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be. Because I can hear him." {n}His lips quiver, and his fingers clench and unclench. He looks pitiful, lost. Bringing one hand to his temple, he squeezes his eyes shut, straining desperately to remember something. Suddenly, his eyes fly open and you hear a strangled moan. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}

Portant une main à sa tempe, il ferme les yeux, comme s'il cherchait désespérément à se rappeler quelque chose. Un instant plus tard, il les rouvre brusquement, laisse échapper un gémissement étouffé et vous lance un regard abasourdi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn betrachtet verwirrt den Servoschädel in seinen Händen und blickt dann über seine Schulter{/n}. "Aber ... Wie ... Nein. Das kann nicht sein. Weil ich ihn hören kann." {n}Seine Lippen zittern, während sich seine Finger öffnen und schließen. Er wirkt bemitleidenswert und verloren. Er legt eine Hand an seine Schläfe, schließt die Augen und versucht verzweifelt, sich an etwas zu erinnern. Plötzlich reißt er die Augen auf und stößt ein unterdrücktes Stöhnen aus. Er sieht dich sprachlos an.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in his hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be. Bringing one hand to his temple, he squeezes his eyes shut, straining desperately to remember something. Suddenly, his eyes fly open and you hear a strangled moan. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}

Weil ich ihn hören kann." {n}Seine Lippen zittern, während sich seine Finger öffnen und schließen. Er wirkt bemitleidenswert und verloren. Er legt eine Hand an seine Schläfe, schließt die Augen und versucht verzweifelt, sich an etwas zu erinnern. Plötzlich reißt er die Augen auf und stößt ein unterdrücktes Stöhnen aus. Er sieht dich sprachlos an.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオグンは手にしたサーボ・スカルに戸惑い、そして肩越しに見た{/n}。「でも...どうして...そんなはずはない。私には彼の声が聞こえるのだから」。{n}彼の唇は震え、指は握られたり解かれたりする。情けなく、迷っているように見える。片手をこめかみに当て、目をぎゅっと閉じ、何かを思い出そうと必死になっている。突然、目が開き、苦しそうなうめき声が聞こえる。彼は呆然とあなたを見ている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in his hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be. Because I can hear him." {n}His lips quiver, and his fingers clench and unclench. He looks pitiful, lost. Bringing one hand to his temple, he squeezes his eyes shut, straining desperately to remember something. Suddenly, his eyes fly open and you hear a strangled moan. He looks at you, dumbfounded.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn önce ellerinde duran hizmelete, sonra da omzunun üzerine kafa karışıklığıyla bakıyor.{/n} "Fakat... Nasıl... Olamaz. Onu duyabiliyorum." {n}Dudakları titriyor, parmakları sıkılıp açılıyor. Acınası, kaybolmuş görünüyor. Bir elini şakaklarına bastırıp gözlerini sıkıca kapatarak çaresizce bir şeyi hatırlamaya çalışıyor. Aniden gözleri ardına kadar açılıyor. Boğuk bir inilti duyuyorsun. Afallamış hâlde sana bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn looks in confusion at the servo-skull in his hands, then over his shoulder{/n}. "But... How... No. It cannot be.
